title: Dragon Ball's Latest Finale Just Set Up A Bold New Era For The Series
summary: The Dragon Ball franchise has just reached the end of an era with a big finale to one of its longest arcs, and it will start a new era for the series.

fullArticle:
Dragon Ball has just reached the end of an era, and the latest finale has set up a new era for the decades-old series, creating theories about what it can explore next. Even though there isn’t any new anime being released right now, with two projects slated for arrival soon, the series is evolving outside of the anime. As of July 8, Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 reached its conclusion with the final story arc added to the game. The update brought forth new takes on classic characters, but with the new ending, there’s more you can expect from the franchise.

The article contains spoilers about the end of the final update to Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 and discusses what that could mean for the future of the series.

As was reported by ComicBook, there is a post-credits cutscene hidden in the epic con...
